causes.detail: The candidate recommended BR for a boiler room and equated it with tolerating more ambient heat before alarm; the pixels provide class/application/response values but no room-selection recommendation.

Fable returned PASS and marked all eight facts supported/page-correct/entailed, but placed two explicitly non-material observations in issues; the frozen local gate treated any non-empty issues list as blocking.

generic_contract_changes_before_next_pop: Forbid application recommendations or scenario selection unless the source pixels state them explicitly.
Separate blocking_issues from nonblocking_notes and require verdict consistency; only blocking issues invalidate PASS.
decision.next_implementation: extract a reusable visual-gold contract before S204
